/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openspodes_loopback_cli.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openspodes_loopback_cli.dir/examples/loopback_cli.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_loopback_cli.dir/tests/mock_transport.c.o CMakeFiles/openspodes_loopback_cli.dir/tests/mock_crypto.c.o -o openspodes_loopback_cli  libopenspodes.a
